---
title: "Nathan Hong"
subtitle: "Actuarial Science Major"
# `profile.jpg` photo by Jan Tinneberg on https://unsplash.com
image: personal image.jpg
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/nathan31h
---

A little bit about me and my life.

## Education

John A. Rowland High School \| Rowland Heights \| Sept 2018 - June 2021

## Experience

Boiling Point \| Server \| July 2021 - June 2024

Topocean \| Part Time - CS \| October 2024 - Present
